query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.parentId, COUNT(p.id) as product_count FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON p.categoryId = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.parentId HAVING product_count > 0 ORDER BY product_count DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xomvQyHT3Pc2eM.33c921a427fa --database 6qKkSV9dybS3AerhXhrTfQ --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, c.parentId, COUNT(p.id) as product_count FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON p.categoryId = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.parentId HAVING product_count > 0 ORDER BY product_count DESC LIMIT 20;
